g.text: Open app and navigate to plant collection
Select a specific plant to navigate to
Retrieve stored location of selected plant
Inform user that no location is set for this plant
Prompt user to set location (manually on map or by standing next to plant)
Retrieve stored location of selected plant
Display warning: location services required for navigation
Prompt user to enable location services in device settings
Calculate distance between user and plant
Display calculated distance and directional indicator toward plant
Display warning about reduced location accuracy
Show last known distance; update when signal improves
Update distance and direction in real-time
Recalculate distance and direction for newly selected plant
Display additional details: nickname, photo, and location notes
